name: scenario2_wrong_name_typed
description: The interviewer typed the wrong candidate name at scheduling time ('Sameer'), but the real candidate is 'Arjun Nair'. The name signal is therefore misleading/uninformative, so the correct pick must come from behaviour. A silent observer ('Conference Room') is present to confirm observers are demoted.

events.text: Welcome! Shall we begin? Tell me about your background.
Hi, I'm Arjun Nair, I've been working as a data engineer for four years.
Can you describe a challenging bug you fixed?
Absolutely. We had a race condition in our pipeline that I traced and fixed.
It taught me a lot about idempotency and safe retries.
